candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Balancing line, not the reported total current assets.
Non-current assets balancing line, not current assets.
Cash flow investing item, not a balance sheet current assets total.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current assets line.

candidates.why: Exact balance sheet cash and cash equivalents line.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the end of the period
candidates.why: Cash flow ending cash line; useful cross-check but target is balance sheet cash.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the beginning of the period
candidates.why: Beginning-period cash, not the balance sheet target.

candidates.row_label: Translation differences in cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: FX adjustment, not cash balance.
Non-cash reconciliation item, not cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Adjustment for non cash items - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing value, not cash balance.

variables.notes: Used the balance sheet cash balance, as required.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities on the balance sheet.
Component of current liabilities, not the total.
Balancing line, not the reported total.
Non-current liabilities, not current liabilities.
Balancing line for non-current liabilities, not current liabilities.
Cash flow change item, not balance sheet total.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Explicit current portion of long-term debt; core short-term debt component.
Current interest-bearing liability; appears financing-related and should be included if no broader current debt total exists.
Current interest-bearing liability; likely short-term debt component.

variables.notes: Excluded 'Current lease liabilities' per instruction. No single clean total current borrowings line is visible, so selected the minimal non-lease current interest-bearing components. Manual review is recommended because 'Current acquistion related interest-bearing liabilities' may be interpreted differently across years.

candidates.why: Best match for current taxes payable/current tax liabilities on the balance sheet.
Deferred tax, not taxes payable/current tax liability.

variables.notes: Chose 'Tax liabilities' as the current taxes payable line; deferred tax was excluded.

candidates.why: Best balance sheet match for net property, plant and equipment.
Only a component of PPE, not total PPE.
Right-of-use/leased assets, not preferred baseline PPE total.
Balancing line, not the substantive reported PPE amount.

variables.notes: Selected the reported net tangible fixed assets line as the closest PPE total. Excluded leased/right-of-use assets as a separate category.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total assets line.

candidates.why: This is the net cash flow from operating activities line, despite the misspelling.

candidates.row_label: Cash Flow from Operating Activities before Changes in Working Capital
candidates.why: Operating cash flow subtotal before working capital changes, not the final net operating cash flow.

candidates.row_label: Other Operating Cash Flow - Cash Flow - to Reconcile
candidates.why: Reconciliation line, not total operating cash flow.

candidates.row_label: Cash Flow from Operating Activities before Changes in Working Capital - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing line, not total operating cash flow.

variables.notes: Chose the final net operating cash flow line from the cash flow statement; label is used exactly as written, including misspelling.
